headline: Analysts See 6% Upside To Textron Inc. (TXT)
summary: Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) is among the 10 Best Aerospace Dividend Stocks to Buy. It has been consistently paying out quarterly dividends for well over three decades, according to records available on the company’s website. On February 24, the Board of Directors approved a quarterly dividend of $0.02 per common share to all stockholders on record […]

headline: Should You Buy Howmet Aerospace After a 33% Rally in 6 Months?
summary: HWM shares jump 33% in six months as strong commercial and defense aerospace demand, rising aircraft production and shareholder payouts fuel momentum.

headline: Iran’s Leader Says Hormuz Should Stay Closed. Military Experts Say Reopening Could Take Weeks.
summary: Iran’s leader said the Strait of Hormuz should remain closed, and military experts say reopening the vital oil shipping route could take weeks or even months.

raw.headline: Iran’s Leader Says Hormuz Should Stay Closed. Military Experts Say Reopening Could Take Weeks.

headline: Tankers Hit in the Strait of Hormuz. Why It’s So Hard to Reopen, According to Military Experts
summary: At that rate, analysts say oil prices would climb to $150, a level that would send the U.S. and other economies into recession.
